title: ribes vulgare var. hortense
intro: Ribes vulgare var. hortense, also known as the garden gooseberry, is a variety of the European gooseberry plant (Ribes uva-crispa), which is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Ribes vulgare var. hortense include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions, from fever and coughs to digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of Ribes vulgare var. hortense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, syrups, and other medicinal products.
